testcase.name: test_stream_with_uploads

failure.message: AssertionError: final answer missing token: I don't see any file uploaded. Please upload the file so I can analyze it and help find the secret token. assert None + where None = <function search at 0xfefd5c4fccc0>('BANANA[\\-\\s]?PHONE[\\-\\s]?9472', "I don't see any file uploaded. Please upload the file so I can analyze it and help find the secret token.", re.IGNORECASE) + where <function search at 0xfefd5c4fccc0> = re.search + and re.IGNORECASE = re.I
